entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00009) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: PROVIDE THE TSA WITH HUMAN CAPITAL SUPPORT SERVICES.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00010) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00010 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO: CORRECTLY IDENTIFY THE END DATE FOR OPTION PERIOD 1, WHICH WAS INCORRECTLY NOTED IN MODIFICATION P00009; CHANGE THE IDENTIFIED PROGRAM DIRECTOR INDENTIFIED UNDER SECTION H.29 KEY PERSONNEL ; INCORPORATE ADDITIONAL LANGUAGE IN SUPPORT OF SECTION G.8 TRAVEL; UPDATE SECTION I.21 SERVICE CONTRACT ACT ; UPDATE ATTACHMENT J.5 WAGE DETERMINATIONS, WITH NEW WAGE DETERMINATIONS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00011) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00011 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO ADD SUB-CLIN 1015AC ESF-52 & BENEFITS PROCESSING AGAINST SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00012) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00012 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO MODIFY STATEMENT OF WORK (SOW) SECTION 4.1 TABLE OF ORGANIZATION WITHIN THE SCOPE OF THE IDIQ AT NO ADDITIONAL COST TO THE GOVERNMENT FOR THE PURPOSE OF PROVIDING CLARIFICATION ON THE REQUIREMENTS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00013) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00013 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO IDENTIFY - HR CONFERENCE, WHICH IS WITHIN THE SCOPE OF THE CONTRACT AND UPDATE SECTION B - SCHEDULE OF SUPPLIES AND SERVICES PRICE/COSTS TO REFLECT THIS REQUIREMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00014) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00014 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO INCORPORATE A CLIN UNDER SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO REFLECT SUPPORT BEING PROVIDED FOR UNDER STATEMENT OF WORK SECTION 13.0 HR CONFERENCE REQUIREMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00015) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00015 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO CORRECT AN ADMINISTRATIVE ERROR IDENTIFIED WITH THE AWARD OF MODIFICATION P00009 (12/02/2009) EXERCISING OPTION PERIOD 1 OF THE SUBJECT IDIQ.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00016) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00016 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO IDENTIFY THE REQUIREMENT, MEDICAL EVALUATION MOBILE MEDICAL, WHICH IS WITHIN SCOPE OF THE IDIQ, UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO REFLECT THIS REQUIREMENT, AND CHANGE THE IDENTIFIED INFORMATION SYSTEMS SECURITY MANAGER AND TIER 1 HELP DESK MANAGER INDENTIFIED UNDER SECTION H.29 KEY PERSONNEL.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00017) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00017 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO IDENTIFY THE REQUIREMENT, NIDW HISTORICAL DATA LOAD AND FULL OPERATIONAL CAPABILITY, WHICH IS WITHIN SCOPE OF THE IDIQ, AND UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO REFLECT THIS REQUIREMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: HUMAN RESOURCES CONSULTING SERVICES (2007), HUMAN RESOURCES AND EXECUTIVE SEARCH CONSULTING SERVICES (2002)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSTS0108DHRM010 (P00018) awarded to LOCKHEED MARTIN INTEGRATED SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF MODIFICATION P00018 AGAINST IDIQ HSTS01-08-D-HRM010 IS TO UPDATE SECTION B SUPPLIES OR SERVICES AND PRICE/COSTS TO INCORPORATE A NEW CPFF CLIN (I.E. 2004AC AIRPORT ASSESSMENT) IN SUPPORT OF CLIN 2004 AIRPORT ASSESSMENT, POST AIRPORT ASSESSMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.
